title: Bad Bunny Monologue (2025)
lyrics:
2 ContributorsBad Bunny Monologue (2025) Lyrics[BAD BUNNY]
Thank you! Thank you, thank you, thank you! It's so good to be back. This is my second time hosting and my fourth time being here. I think Marcelo is getting nervous that Loren has a new favorite Latino.

[MARCELO HERNANDEZ]
I am.

[BAD BUNNY]
This time I'm only hosting because I need a rest. I just finished a thirty one show residency in Puerto Rico. Yeah. And I'm still
kind of tired because the show are three hours long and there's a lot of complicated choreography like this.

That looks simple, but that took me a long time to learn, trust me. Anyways, my residency was beautiful. Everyonе loved it. Some celеbrities came to my show. Few of them were on drugs. I don't want to say who, but this was Jon Hamm.

Actually, actually, that wasn't Jon Hamm. That was Juan Ramon. I think he's a little obsessed with me. But anyways, you might not know this, but I'm doing the Super Bowl half-time show.
And I'm very happy, I'm very happy. I think everyone is happy about it. Even, even, Fox News.

[FOX NEWS CLIPS COMPILATION]
Bad Bunny.
Is.
My.
Favorite.
Musician.
And he should.
Be.
The next.
President.


[BAD BUNNY]
Wow. Thank you. No, no, but, but, but, really, I'm very excited to be doing the Super Bowl. And I know that people all around the world who love my music are also happy. Especialmente todos los latinos. Todos los latinos y las latinas en el mundo entero, y aquí en los Estados Unidos,todas las personas han trabajado para abrir puertas. Más que un logro mío... más, más que un logro mío, es un logro de todos, demostrando que nuestra huella y nuestra aportación en este país nadie nunca le podrá sacar ni borrar. And if you didn't understand what I just said, you have four months to learn.

We have a great show for you tonight! Doja Cat is here. So stick around. We'll be right back.
